---
title: "Kaggle : Sleep staging"
description: "Deep learning for sleep stage scoring on EEG signals. Competition hosted in partnership with Dreem, a company developing sleep monitoring headbands. "
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/dreem-3-sleep-staging-challenge-2021
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: MSc at BME Paris (Bioengineering and Innovation in Neuroscience track)
    affiliation-url: https://www.bme-paris.com/program/master-2/bioengineering-and-innovation-in-neurosciences-bin/
date: 11-17-2021
categories: [Python, University project, Kaggle, Deep learning] # self-defined categories
image: dreem-kaggle.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
